# Marco Civil da Internet

Jurisdiction: Brazil
Region: BR
Citation: Lei No. 12.965/2014
Authority: Brazilian Government
Source URL: https://www.planalto.gov.br/ccivil_03/_ato2011-2014/2014/lei/l12965.htm
Topics: notice_transparency, third_party_sharing, retention_deletion, security_breach, accountability
Keywords: Marco Civil da Internet, connection logs, application logs, Brazil

## Summary
Brazilian Internet Civil Rights Framework with internet-user rights, log retention, and network/application provider obligations.

## Key compliance obligations
- Check internet log retention and disclosure rules.
- Protect user privacy and communications confidentiality.
- Use with LGPD for online services.
